summary: R3 architecture review inspected writer R3 handoff, actual diff through commit 6f46b27a, canonical WorldState hashing, structured validation for joinedCommitmentTroops, deterministic march execution, quantity-aware reinforcement joins, protocol/read-model serializability, package boundaries, and required tests. The R1/R2 blockers are resolved. Scope remains limited to sim-core, protocol, tests, and process handoffs; no siege decision, automatic battle resolution, postwar governance, campaign AI policy, client UI, save-format, complex naval war, diplomacy, or architecture/product drift was introduced.

tests_run.result: validateWorldStateV0 returned structured invalid-schema error for state.m4.marches[0].joinedCommitmentTroops and did not throw.
canonicalWorldStateV0Text included state.m4.marches with routeSegments in accepted 3->2 then 2->1 order and sorted unordered reason/joined troop sublists.
Node and worker-compatible command/query and save/load deterministic hashes matched.
Architecture boundaries passed; determinism passed; 30 root Vitest files and 202 tests passed; web Vitest 1 file and 3 tests passed.

decisions: Accepted R3 canonical hash fix: state.m4.marches now participates in canonical WorldState text and stateHash.
Accepted ordered path handling: routeSegments remain in accepted route order through canonicalization, hashing, and daily execution.
Accepted quantity-aware reinforcement model: joinedCommitmentTroops tracks per-commitment joined quantities while joinedCommitmentIds remains the display/query ID list.
Accepted validation fix: joinedCommitmentTroops is required by march shape validation, so missing ledgers return structured invalid-schema errors before runtime invariant checks.

No ADR is required for this task because changes remain within approved M4 sim-core/protocol command/query and WorldState surfaces and do not alter frozen platform, save-format, architecture, or product decisions.
risks: M4 march state is live authoritative WorldState but save-format is intentionally unchanged due task boundaries; route a later explicit M4 save/runtime task before relying on persistent M4 march saves.
Rainy-season pause remains plan-time based on accepted-route season risk rather than daily route reforecasting; acceptable for this milestone task as a documented bounded assumption.
requested_action: Proceed with lead integration gates for M4-MARCH-SUPPLY-STATE-001.
